prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次约36819→39068→47216→46513→45887，整体呈波动后移趋势，2023年达到峰值47216后略有回升；2025年基准约45887名，近3年累计后移约9000名；该校在河南省理科/物理类计划2021年60人、2022年58人、2023年56人、2024年59人、2025年108人（大幅扩招）；2026年计划156人，较2025年再扩招约44%，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第77名，近年排名稳定在70–80区间，属中上游211；2024年声誉评价偏负面（校园安全事件），但未见持续发酵；抖音热度排名第88位，评价为「一般」，综合热度约22万，关注度中等；近年无投档断档记录；化学为A-学科，是福州大学唯一A-及以上学科；化学工程与工艺、材料科学与工程等关联专业具备一定学科基础。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电气工程及其自动化、电子信息/通信等专业社会热度高热推荐，对理科考生吸引力强；土木建筑、生化环材等专业明显劝退。河南省2026年高考总人数约120万（较2025年约90万大幅增加），按历史比例估算物理类考生约73.4万，竞争加剧。2026年；福州大学位于福建省，非河南省本地高校，在河南招生占比约6.6%（2025年），属跨省招生，地域偏好因素中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年计划大幅扩招（44%）缓解竞争、但河南省考生总数显著增加（约32%）加剧竞争，以及声誉偏负面、专业热度分化等因素。预测2026年理科/物理类最低位次约57924名，区间57424–58424名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 36819 → 39068 → 47216 → 46513 → 45887, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, peaking at 47216 in 2023 and then slightly recovering; the 2025 baseline is about 45887, with a cumulative backward shift of about 9000 positions over the past 3 years; the university's enrollment plan in Henan for Science/Physics Category was 60 in 2021, 58 in 2022, 56 in 2023, 59 in 2024, and 108 in 2025 (significant expansion); the 2026 plan is 156, an additional expansion of about 44% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked approximately 77th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 70–80 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the 2024 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (campus safety incident), but it did not persist; Douyin popularity ranking is 88th, rated as 'average', with a comprehensive popularity of about 220,000, indicating moderate attention; no record of admission gaps in recent years; Chemistry is an A- discipline, the only A- or above discipline at Fuzhou University; related majors such as Chemical Engineering and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering have a certain disciplinary foundation.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication are highly popular and recommended, strongly attracting science students; majors like Civil Engineering, Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials are clearly discouraged. The total number of Henan college entrance examination takers in 2026 is about 1.2 million (significantly increased from about 900,000 in 2025), with an estimated 734,000 Physics Category candidates based on historical proportions, intensifying competition. In 2026, Fuzhou University is located in Fujian Province, not a local university in Henan, with about 6.6% of its enrollment in Henan (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with neutral regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the significant expansion of the 2026 plan (44%) easing competition, but the notable increase in the total number of Henan candidates (about 32%) intensifying competition, along with somewhat negative reputation and polarized major popularity. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Science/Physics Category in 2026 will be about 57924, with a range of 57424–58424.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 57424–58424, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main application direction, Tier 1 majors can be considered as reach goals (requiring rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range), and Tier 3 majors as safety choices. Chemistry (A- discipline) is the flagship major of Fuzhou University with outstanding cost-effectiveness, and it is recommended to pay special attention. Popular majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering are highly competitive and require reasonable positioning based on one's own ranking.
